title: hypochaeris odorata var. eurylepis
intro: Hypochaeris odorata var. eurylepis, also known as the fragrant dandelion or stinking hawk's beard, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to parts of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hypochaeris odorata var. eurylepis include its use as a natural laxative, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory agent, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for digestive issues and skin conditions. Hypochaeris odorata var. eurylepis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of bloating and indigestion.
